rows.content: TYPEMATIC RATE+- Specifies the typematic repeat rate.  Specify a value
between 1 and 10, where 1 is the minimum rate, and 10 is the maximum
rate.  If 0 is specified, the typematic rate in not changed.
TYPEMATIC DELAY+- Specifies the typematic delay.  Specify a value
between 1 and 4, where 1 is the maximum delay, and 4 is the minimum
delay.  If 0 is specified, the typematic delay in not changed.
OVERTYPE CURSOR SIZE+- Specifies the vertical size of the cursor in
overtype mode as a percentage of the maximum possible size. Specify
a number in the range of 1 to 100.  If 0 is specified, the overtype
INSERT CURSOR SIZE+- Specifies the vertical size of the cursor in
insert mode as a percentage of the maximum possible size. Specify a
number in the range of 1 to 100.  If 0 is specified, the insert
